authors.author: Eliza Edmunds Hewitt
John R. Sweney
Hätte ich mehr von Jesus nur

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: More about Jesus I would know, More of His grace to others show; More of His saving fullness see, More of His love, who died for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: More, more about Jesus, More, more about Jesus; More of His saving fullness see, More of His love, who died for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: More about Jesus let me learn, More of His holy will discern; Spirit of God my teacher be, Showing the things of Christ to me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: More about Jesus in His Word, Holding communion with my Lord, Hearing His voice in ev'ry line, Making each faithful saying mine.

verse.name: v5
